android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETE.description: Allows an application to start itself as soon as the system has finished booting. This can make it take longer to start the phone and allow the application to slow down the overall phone by always running.

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE.info: enables regular apps to use Service.startForeground.
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE.description: Allows a regular application to use Service.startForeground.

android.permission.INTERNET.description: Allows an application to create network sockets.

android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS.info: allows an app to post notifications.
android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS.description: Allows an app to post notifications

android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS.description: Allows an application to modify the system's secure settings data. Not for use by common applications.

manifest_findings.title: App can be installed on a vulnerable unpatched Android version 7.0, [minSdk=24]
manifest_findings.description: This application can be installed on an older version of android that has multiple unfixed vulnerabilities. These devices won't receive reasonable security updates from Google. Support an Android version => 10, API 29 to receive reasonable security updates.
manifest_findings.name: App can be installed on a vulnerable unpatched Android version 7.0, [minSdk=24]

manifest_findings.title: App is direct-boot aware [android:directBootAware=true]
manifest_findings.description: This app can run before the user unlocks the device. If you're using a custom subclass of Application, and if any component inside your application is direct - boot aware, then your entire custom application is considered to be direct - boot aware.During Direct Boot, your application can only access the data that is stored in device protected storage.
manifest_findings.name: App is direct-boot aware [android:directBootAware=true]

manifest_findings.title: Application Data can be Backed up [android:allowBackup=true]
manifest_findings.description: This flag allows anyone to backup your application data via adb. It allows users who have enabled USB debugging to copy application data off of the device.
manifest_findings.name: Application Data can be Backed up [android:allowBackup=true]

manifest_findings.title: Activity (moe.shizuku.manager.authorization.RequestPermissionActivity) is Protected by a permission, but the protection level of the permission should be checked. Permission: android.permission.INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS_FULL [android:exported=true]
manifest_findings.description: An Activity is found to be shared with other apps on the device therefore leaving it accessible to any other application on the device. It is protected by a permission which is not defined in the analysed application. As a result, the protection level of the permission should be checked where it is defined. If it is set to normal or dangerous, a malicious application can request and obtain the permission and interact with the component. If it is set to signature, only applications signed with the same certificate can obtain the permission.
manifest_findings.name: Activity moe.shizuku.manager.authorization.RequestPermissionActivity is Protected by a permission, but the protection level of the permission should be checked. [Permission: android.permission.INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS_FULL] [android:exported=true]

nx.description: The binary has NX bit set. This marks a memory page non-executable making attacker injected shellcode non-executable.

pie.description: The shared object is build with -fPIC flag which enables Position independent code. This makes Return Oriented Programming (ROP) attacks much more difficult to execute reliably.

stack_canary.description: This binary has a stack canary value added to the stack so that it will be overwritten by a stack buffer that overflows the return address. This allows detection of overflows by verifying the integrity of the canary before function return.

relocation_readonly.description: This shared object has full RELRO enabled. RELRO ensures that the GOT cannot be overwritten in vulnerable ELF binaries. In Full RELRO, the entire GOT (.got and .got.plt both) is marked as read-only.

rpath.description: The binary does not have run-time search path or RPATH set.

runpath.description: The binary does not have RUNPATH set.

fortify.description: The binary has the following fortified functions: ['__read_chk', '__memcpy_chk']

relocation_readonly.description: This shared object has full RELRO enabled. RELRO ensures that the GOT cannot be overwritten in vulnerable ELF binaries. In Full RELRO, the entire GOT (.got and .got.plt both) is marked as read-only.

rpath.description: The binary does not have run-time search path or RPATH set.

runpath.description: The binary does not have RUNPATH set.

fortify.description: The binary has the following fortified functions: ['__write_chk']

metadata.description: Query Database of SMS, Contacts etc

metadata.cwe: CWE-532: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
metadata.description: The App logs information. Sensitive information should never be logged.

metadata.cwe: CWE-330: Use of Insufficiently Random Values
metadata.description: The App uses an insecure Random Number Generator.
This App copies data to clipboard. Sensitive data should not be copied to clipboard as other applications can access it.
This app has capabilities to prevent tapjacking attacks.

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "يرجى ملاحظة أن الجزء الأيسر من خيار "التصحيح اللاسلكي" قابل للنقر عليه ، وسيؤدي النقر عليه إلى فتح صفحة جديدة. تفعيل "التصحيح اللاسلكي" من المفتاح الأيمن قد يكون غير صحيح."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "Reține că partea din stânga a opțiunii "Depanare fără fir" este click-abilă, apăsarea acesteia va deschide o pagina nouă. Este incorect să pornești doar comutatorul din dreapta."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "System wymaga ciągle otwartego okna parowania, używanie trybu podzielonego ekranu jest jedyną opcją aby korzystać z aplikacji i okna parowania w jednej chwili."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "%1$s hat moderne Shizuku-Unterstützung, aber es fordert Legacy Shizuku an. Dies könnte daran liegen, dass Shizuku nicht läuft. Bitte in der Shizuku-App überprüfen.

Legacy Shizuku wird seit März 2019 nicht mehr unterstützt."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "Con %1$s, in qualsiasi app terminale, puoi connetterti e interagire con la shell eseguita da Shizuku.

Per info sull'utilizzo dettagliato di %1$s, tocca per visualizzare il documento."
"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "Ingrese primero al modo de pantalla dividida (ventanas múltiples)."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "Kromě toho lze Shizuku spustit automaticky při spuštění. Pokud ne, zkontrolujte, zda váš systém nebo nástroje třetích stran neomezují Shizuku.
Můžete se podívat na %s."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "Habilite "Depuración inalámbrica" en "Opciones de desarrollador". La "depuración inalámbrica" se desactiva automáticamente cuando cambia la red. 
 
Tenga en cuenta que no desactive las "Opciones de desarrollador" o la "Depuración USB", o Shizuku se detendrá."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "არა დარუთული მოწყობილობებისთვის, Shizuku რომ ჩართო შენ გჭირდება ადბ-ს გამოყენება(საჭიროებს კომპიუტერთან კავშირს). ეს პროცესი უნდა გაიმეოროთ თქვენი მოწყობილობის ყოველ გადატვირთვაზე. გთხოვთ წაიკითხოთ დახმარება."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "قامت الشركة المصنعة لجهازك بتقييد أذونات adb ولن تعمل التطبيقات التي تستخدم Shizuku بشكل صحيح. 
 
عادة ، يمكن رفع هذا القيد عن طريق تعديل بعض الخيارات في "خيارات المطور". يرجى قراءة التعليمات للحصول على تفاصيل حول كيفية القيام بذلك. 
 
قد تحتاج إلى إعادة تشغيل Shizuku حتى تدخل العملية حيز التنفيذ."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "Pwede ring awtomatikong masimulan ang Shizuku pagka-boot. Kung hindi, maaaring nilimitahan ng iyong sistema o ng third-party na kagamitan ang Shizuku.
Sumangguni sa %s."

"0_resource_name_obfuscated" : "Na Androidu 11 ali več, lahko vklopite Brezžično razhroščevanje in začnete Shizuku direktno iz vaše naprave, brez povezovanja na računalnik.

Prosimo, najprej poglejte vodnik po korakih."

high.title: App can be installed on a vulnerable unpatched Android version 7.0, [minSdk=24]
high.description: This application can be installed on an older version of android that has multiple unfixed vulnerabilities. These devices won't receive reasonable security updates from Google. Support an Android version => 10, API 29 to receive reasonable security updates.

warning.title: Application Data can be Backed up [android:allowBackup=true]
warning.description: This flag allows anyone to backup your application data via adb. It allows users who have enabled USB debugging to copy application data off of the device.

warning.title: Activity (moe.shizuku.manager.authorization.RequestPermissionActivity) is Protected by a permission, but the protection level of the permission should be checked. Permission: android.permission.INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS_FULL [android:exported=true]
warning.description: An Activity is found to be shared with other apps on the device therefore leaving it accessible to any other application on the device. It is protected by a permission which is not defined in the analysed application. As a result, the protection level of the permission should be checked where it is defined. If it is set to normal or dangerous, a malicious application can request and obtain the permission and interact with the component. If it is set to signature, only applications signed with the same certificate can obtain the permission.
